name: chanter-auto-poster
description: Local TikTok photo queue and scheduler for the CHANTER content workflow.

scripts.build: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/routes.js && node --check src/scheduler.js && node --check src/storage.js && node --check src/tiktok.js && node -e "const ejs=require('ejs'),fs=require('fs'); ejs.compile(fs.readFileSync('src/views/index.ejs','utf8'),{filename:'src/views/index.ejs'});"
